item.description:
Yati — Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: February 6, 2026
Last Updated: February 6, 2026

Welcome to Yati, a game and wellness experience developed and operated by Jayka Studios LLP (“we”, “us”, or “our”). By accessing or using Yati, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use Yati.

1. Overview of Services

Yati is an interactive game where users progress through levels designed to provide entertainment and a sense of general well-being. The activities within the game are intended to support:

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service and the choices you have associated with that data.

We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. Unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy, terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions.
